rulings.Rulings: Preliminary Tentative: Notes were emailed to the trustee's counsel on 02/21/2020 at 11:24 a.m. Endorsed-filed courtesy copies of all documents filed in response to the notes must be received by the assigned examiner no later than 04/06/2020.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE GIULIANA MAUBERRET DECLARATION OF TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition Confirming Property As Assets Of The Trust And Instructing The Trustee
rulings.Rulings: Preliminary Tentative: Notes were emailed to counsel on 02/28/2020 at 8:17 a.m. Endorsed-filed one-sided courtesy copies of all documents addressing the issues raised in the notes, together with updated proposed orders (if applicable), must be received by the assigned examiner by 04/06/2020 to avoid an automatic continuance for two or more weeks. See LRSF 14.6C. Proposed orders must be hard copies and may not be e-filed, faxed, or emailed. See LRSF 14.6A & 14.93K.
